title: leptochilus metallicus
intro: Leptochilus metallicus, also known as the Metallic Club Moss, is a type of ancient plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leptochilus metallicus include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil to make a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
